prerequisites: A generated Gainsight PX API key to use as the api_key config field.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single Gainsight PX API key supplied in the api_key field. The key is generated from the Gainsight PX dashboard settings and is required for the connector to work.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key in Gainsight PX
setupSteps.body: In the Gainsight PX dashboard, open the API keys page under settings (https://app.aptrinsic.com/settings/api-keys) and generate an API key. Copy the generated key value.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key as the api_key config field. This value is secret. The connector calls the Gainsight PX REST API at base URL https://api.aptrinsic.com/v1 (for example GET https://api.aptrinsic.com/v1/accounts).

sources.title: Work with the Gainsight PX REST API
